title: 螃蟹的城建 Crab city facilities
description: Added some Chinese style urban facilities
body:
This mod has added some Chinese style city facilities that can decorate the player's city. Currently, there are transportation, a bunch of facilities, railings, etc., which can be used together with Crab Street Light for more richness. The author is a Chinese student and the software used is MCreator
note:English is machine translated from Chinese. Please understand if there are any errors
